extra.reason: Implemented and tested. All 39 E2E tests passing.
Implemented and tested. All 39 E2E tests passing.
Implemented and tested. All 39 E2E tests passing.
Changed toast from green to menu-matching gray with elevation shadow

Fixed debounce sync bug (Event→skipFileSync), reduced interval 5s→2s, added unsaved-edit conflict guard, deduped escapeHtml, added a11y attributes, history memory cap, fixed string throw in Editor.save()
Added 7 bullet tests: nested bullets (2-space indent), ordered lists (1./2./3.), mixed ordered+unordered, deep nesting (4-space indent level 2)

Fixed bullet Enter behavior: preserved newlines in parseMarkdown output, kept raw '-' marker in textContent (CSS ::before shows • visually), so nextListAction can detect line boundaries and continue/exit lists correctly

Fixed: debounce sync bug (Event→skipFileSync), duplicate escapeHtml, a11y attributes (aria-labels, aria-live), history memory cap (10MB), string throw in Editor.save(), unsaved-edit conflict guard in sync
Updated README with feature list, usage instructions, and project metadata

Fixed debounce highlight to fire on beforeinput events (agent-browser keyboard type compatibility). Added saveOffset/restoreOffset for reliable cursor preservation across re-renders. Created 21 key-by-key interaction tests, all passing. Covers: unordered/ordered typing, Enter continuation, double-Enter exit, Tab sub-bullets, Shift-Tab outdent, cursor position verification, and raw textContent format.

Tab/Shift-Tab already works correctly. indentSelection() adds/removes 2-space indent on the current line, and parseMarkdown correctly re-renders nested list items. Verified by tab_subbullet and shift_tab_outdent tests.

Ordered and unordered lists already behave identically. nextListAction() handles both types with the same logic: Enter on non-empty adds new item (with - or incremented number), Enter on empty exits, Tab indents, Shift-Tab outdents. Verified by matching test coverage for both list types.

Cursor stability fixed with saveOffset/restoreOffset. Debounce at 30ms minimizes flicker. Marker jumping during rapid typing would require visual TUI verification - screenshots taken in test-results/. Core functionality verified by 21 automated tests.

URLs in [text](url) are now clickable <a> tags, textContent preserved. 6 tests passing.
Outlook paste works: MsoListParagraph, numbered lists, bullet glyphs, standard <ul> all convert to markdown. Fixed blank lines between MsoListParagraph items. 7 tests passing.
Shift+Enter inserts blank line before list. 1 test passing.
Moved spacing from contentSpan to markerSpan. Grid column-gap handles visual spacing. No extra space on new items. 2 tests passing.
Split list item at cursor position on Enter. 4 tests passing.
